result.stdout:
Zaunic v0.0.4

USAGE
  dotnet Zaunic.dll [options]
  dotnet Zaunic.dll [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  data get-sample   
  data add          
  os get            
  init              
  output-folder set  
  project del       
  project add       
  template get-sample-handlebars  
  template get-sample-liquid  
  template get-sample-handlebars  
  template get-sample-mustache  
  template get-sample-razor  
  template add      
  template list-extensions  
  ws run            

You can run `dotnet Zaunic.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

USAGE

* datafilename      Name of data file (yml).
